name: Laredo Oil, Inc.
business: Laredo Oil, Inc. is an oil exploration and production company primarily engaged in recovering stranded oil from mature oil fields using underground gravity drainage (UGD) enhanced recovery methods. The company also conducts conventional drilling operations. As of May 31, 2025, it had five full-time employees and its principal executive office is in Austin, Texas.

exposures.sentence: We are an oil exploration and production company, primarily engaged in acquisition and exploration efforts to find mineral reserves on various properties.

catalysts.event: Complete fundraising of $7.5 million to drill three exploratory wells in West Fork area
catalysts.sentence: We continue to expect that the $7.5 million we seek will be completed by early Fall 2025, providing adequate funds to drill the three exploratory wells before year end and finish early in 2026, weather permitting.
